description: vans Era taps into the popular striped mood of the moment with this low-top pair. Stylish enough to wear sockless, wear this spin off from the classic Vans Era with off-duty essentials. Vans has used textures of canvas on the heel collar, perfect to match the rich denim hues in your ensemble.UpperCanvas upper with pinstripesVanslite super-soft molded and contoured EVA sandal sock liner Central lacing systemLogo flag on midfootPadded tongue and collar for instep comfortCut low at the ankle for styleMidsolePU midsole for better shock absorptionPU foxing on the toe boxOutsoleGeometric patterned sole texture on the flexible vulcanized gum rubber outsoleshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
